headline: Interactive Brokers Group Reports Brokerage Metrics and Other Financial Information for May 2026, includes Reg.-NMS Execution Statistics
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 01, 2026--Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: IBKR) an automated global electronic broker, today reported its Electronic Brokerage monthly performance metrics for May.

headline: Interactive Brokers Integrates AI into Client Portfolios – Informed by Agentic Technology, Controlled by the Client
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., June 01, 2026--Interactive Brokers (Nasdaq: IBKR) today announced agentic trading through direct integration with Claude, one of the world's leading AI platforms.

headline: Individual traders drove Kalshi’s rise. Now, it’s going for Wall Street
summary: In a series of moves in 2026, the prediction market platform in the U.S. is working to make its event contracts more attractive to institutional trading.

headline: Why Interactive Brokers (IBKR) Is Up 6.9% After Upgraded Double-Digit Quarterly Earnings Forecasts – And What's Next
summary: In recent days, analysts’ projections for Interactive Brokers Group’s upcoming quarter have pointed to a double‑digit percentage increase in both earnings per share and revenue compared with last year. This shift in expectations has sharpened attention on how the broker’s business model could respond to higher anticipated trading activity and client engagement. We’ll now examine how these stronger earnings and revenue expectations may reshape Interactive Brokers Group’s existing investment...
